title: Zelenskyy Reiterates Truce Offer Ahead of Orthodox Easter
detail: President Zelenskyy renewed Ukraine's ceasefire proposal ahead of Orthodox Easter, signaling continued diplomatic openness despite ongoing Russian aerial bombardment of Ukrainian cities. The gesture underscores Kyiv's effort to frame Russia as the obstacle to peace while maintaining military pressure on the frontline.

title: Russia Threatens Baltic States Over Ukrainian Drone Transit
detail: Russia issued threats against Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania, warning of consequences if those NATO member states permit Ukrainian drone strikes to originate from or transit their territory. The escalatory warning marks a direct challenge to three NATO members and raises tensions along the alliance's northeastern flank.

title: Russia Confirms 16 Cameroonian Soldiers Killed Fighting in Ukraine
detail: Russia officially acknowledged that 16 Cameroonian soldiers were killed fighting in Ukraine, marking the first official Russian confirmation of African troop casualties in the war. The disclosure underscores the international scope of foreign fighter recruitment by Moscow and raises questions about the scale of African national involvement in Russian frontline units.

media.caption: Russia confirms 16 Cameroonian soldiers killed in Ukraine war

title: Ukraine Deploys War Robots and Autonomous Drones to Front Lines
detail: Ukraine has deployed war robots and autonomous drones to front lines in growing numbers, testing Russian defenses and marking a new phase of automated battlefield tactics. The unmanned ground and aerial systems are being used to reduce Ukrainian troop exposure while maintaining pressure on Russian positions, signaling a broader shift toward autonomous warfare in the conflict.
